abilities.name: Assault Training
abilities.description: May treat Flamethrowers as if Range y3.

abilities.name: Freikorps Suit
abilities.description: Ignores all damage from pulse and blast effects.

abilities.name: Punctured Tanks
abilities.description: If suffering Critical Effect targeting Chest (Ram), discard card to avoid it. If not, killed and characters within p3 suffer 1 damage and Burning +2.

actions: (1) Flamethrower (Heavy Guns) | AV: 6R (13R) | Rg: y3 or z10 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3B/4BB damage and Burning +1. Grants + to Intimidate. Ram Youre Flammable: +1 Burning per Ram. Crow Sadistic Laughter: TN 10 Horror Duel. Capacity 20, Reload 8.
(1) Move or Burn | Friendly characters within p10 with Slow or Paralyzed lose it and gain Burning +1.
(0) Freikorps Tactics | Discard card to add suit of choice to every duel until start of next turn.
system.notes: Elite Freikorps trained with Wyrms Breath flamethrowers. Encased in armored suits with chemical canisters. Terrifying on battlefield.
